mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dungeon_spawn_slot (dungeon_id, spawn_type, monster_id, slot_index, respawn_at, engaged_character_id) VALUES (#{dungeonId}, #{spawnType}, #{monsterId}, #{slotIndex}, #{respawnAt}, #{engagedCharacterId})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM dungeon_spawn_slot WHERE dungeon_id = #{dungeonId}
SELECT * FROM dungeon_spawn_slot WHERE dungeon_id = #{dungeonId} ORDER BY spawn_type, monster_id, slot_index
mapper.update: UPDATE dungeon_spawn_slot SET engaged_character_id = NULL, respawn_at = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE dungeon_spawn_slot SET engaged_character_id = NULL, respawn_at = 0 WHERE dungeon_id = #{dungeonId}
